name: Lightsworn Aegis
name_jp: ライトロード・アイギス
desc: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Lightsworn" monsters you control; negate their effects until the end of this turn. If this card is sent from the Deck to the GY: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Lightsworn Aegis" once per turn.
eff: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Lightsworn" monsters you control; negate their effects until the end of this turn. If this card is sent from the Deck to the GY: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Lightsworn Aegis" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
